title: Introduction to Secure Network Infrastructure with Azure network security
summary: Learn to protect your network from cyber security attacks to secure your networking infrastructure.

sections.title: Introduction to Secure Network Infrastructure with Azure network security
sections.summary: Learn to protect your network from cyber security attacks to secure your networking infrastructure.

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Firewall
lessons.content_md:
Describe how Azure Firewall protects Azure Virtual Network resources, including the Azure Firewall features, rules, deployment options, and administration with Azure Firewall Manager.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-azure-firewall/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Firewall Manager
lessons.content_md:
Describe how Azure Firewall Manager provides central security policy and route management for your cloud-based security perimeters. Determine whether Azure Firewall Manager can help you secure your cloud perimeters.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-firewall-manager/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to Secure Network Infrastructure with Azure network security
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to Secure Network Infrastructure with Azure network security**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
